name: python3-autobahn
title: python3-autobahn
summary: WebSocket client and server library, WAMP framework - Python 3.x
description:
WebSocket client and server library, WAMP framework - Python 3.x
Autobahn|Python is a networking library that is part of the Autobahn project
and provides implementations of:
* The WebSocket Protocol
* The Web Application Messaging Protocol (WAMP)
for Twisted and asyncio, on Python 2 & 3 and for writing servers and clients.
.
WebSocket allows bidirectional real-time messaging on the Web and WAMP adds
asynchronous Remote Procedure Calls and Publish & Subscribe on top of
WebSocket.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.

commands.name: xbrnetwork
commands.description: You must install the [xbr] extra to use xbrnetwork

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use wamp because WebSocket client and server library, WAMP framework - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use wamp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wamp [options] [args]` as documented upstream for wamp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair wamp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wamp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
